title: On The Same. (On Seeing The Beautiful Seat Of Lord Galloway.)
content:
No Stewart art thou, Galloway,
            The Stewarts all were brave;
        Besides, the Stewarts were but fools,
            Not one of them a knave.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "On The Same. (On Seeing The Beautiful Seat Of Lord Galloway.)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
